title: Origins Backgrounds
description: Adding a new layer to your Origins experience
body:
Origins: Backgrounds

Adding a new layer to Origins!
With this mod, you can add a background to your character. Were they a fisher? A sailor? A cultist? It's all up to you.

Each background comes with a small positive effect, small enough it won't upset the balance, even without a negative effect.

 

Backgrounds are their own type, so they won't be competing with your *Hundreds* of Origins or Classes.

In Fact, you can have an Origin, a Class and a Background, similar to a popular TTRPG.

Origins (Forge) is required.

 

Origins: Classes (Forge) is optional, but recommended.
